title: Mycelium Protocol
description: A cellular mesh collapses inward — organic architecture unwinding into signal noise. The spiral remembers what the network has forgotten.

title: Corrupted Spore Field
description: Dispersal patterns interrupted by signal noise. What the model imagined when asked to forget what it knew about symmetry.

title: Null Bloom, Series I
description: Flowering in the absence of light. The color palette was discovered by removing all warm frequencies from the training signal.
